calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Complete Administrative Record
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Text Ruling

Hearing Re: Plaintiffs/Petitioners' Motion To Complete The Administrative Record
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
David Schwarz (310-770-3276; DSchwarz@sheppardmullin.com) for Petitioners.
William Downer (William.Downer@doj.ca.gov) and Lisa Cisneros for Respondents.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Hearing Re: Plaintiffs/Petitioners' Motion To Complete The Administrative Record is taken under submission. Ms. Cisneros to e-file & e-serve remaining 2 documents by end of business day 2/11/2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Hearing Re: Plaintiffs/Petitioners' Application For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID A. SCHWARZ, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP (Tel: 310-228-3700) for Plaintiffs Western Growers Association, California Farm Bureau Federation, California Business Roundtable, Grower-Shipper Association of Central California, California Association of Winegrape Growers, and Ventura County Agricultural Association;
Atty. Attys. WILLIAM H. DOWNER, Esq. and VILMA PALMA-SOLANA, Esq. of the California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 916-210-6120) appearing for Defendants California Occupational Safety and Health Standards Board, David Thomas, Chris Laszcz-Davis, Laura Stock, Barbara Burgel, David Harrison, and Nola J. Kennedy, in their official capacities as Members of the California Occupational Safety and Health Standards Board, Christina Shupe, in her official capacity as Executive Officer of the California Occupational Safety and Health Standards Board, California Division of Occupational Safety and Health, and Douglas L. Parker, in his official capacity as Chief, California Division of Occupational Safety and Health.

Hearing Re: Plaintiffs/Petitioners' Application For Preliminary Injunction.

The Court instructs the parties to efile under the CPF-21-517344 case number any motion papers that were emailed to Dept. 302 but were not filed in Los Angeles Superior Court.

The Court proposes allowing all Amici Curiae briefs to be filed, but will not allow the factual record to be expanded upon by Amici Curiae outside of Plaintiffs and Defendants' factual record, nor will the Court allow anything improper for the Court to take judicial notice of, nor will the Court allow any issues to be raised by Amici Curiae that have not been raised by Plaintiffs and Defendants.

As to Plaintiffs' motion to complete the administrative record, the Court sets the following briefing schedule: Defendants' opposition is due 2/3/21; Plaintiffs' reply is due 2/8/21; hearing on the motion is set for 2/11/21 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

The Court sets a deadline of 2/5/21 for Defendants' to file their responsive pleading to the Verified Complaint.

Argument presented by counsel for both sides regarding Plaintiffs' Application for Prelimninary Injunction.

The Court sets a deadline of 2/5/21 for each side to file a supplemental brief no longer than 8 pages in length which may address the relief and severability issues raised by the parties at today's hearing or anything else the parties believe to be critical.

The Court will deem this matter submitted on 2/11/21.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
